title: 英语食物与饮料
description: 去任何地方都能点喜欢的菜！

scenes.speech: 食物英语全世界通用加鲁！🍔
scenes.title: 餐桌英语
scenes.content: 本课学习「英语食物与饮料」。无论旅游、留学还是去餐厅，都能点到自己喜欢的菜。

scenes.speech: 喜欢的食物用英语怎么说？
scenes.title: 食物词汇
scenes.content: pizza, hamburger, sushi, ramen, sandwich, salad, rice, noodles。从喜欢的开始记是坚持的秘诀。
scenes.highlight:
🍕 pizza  🍔 burger  🍣 sushi
🍜 ramen  🥗 salad  🍚 rice

scenes.title: 饮料
scenes.content: water, milk, juice, tea, coffee, soda。最重要的水是water。Can I have some water?超好用。
scenes.highlight:
💧 water  🥛 milk  🧃 juice
🍵 tea  ☕ coffee  🥤 soda

scenes.title: 说出状态
scenes.content: I'm hungry. I'm thirsty.两句简单的话，在家或外面都能开启餐桌话题。

scenes.title: 点餐
scenes.content: Can I have a hamburger, please?礼貌请求的句型。加please立刻有印象。
scenes.highlight:
Can I have ___, please?
I'd like ___, please.

scenes.title: 喜欢/不喜欢
scenes.content: I like sushi. I don't like onions.过敏的话也要记I'm allergic to peanuts.
scenes.highlight:
I like ___ .
I don't like ___ .
I'm allergic to ___ .

scenes.title: 表达感想
scenes.content: It's delicious! Yummy! Tasty!用言语传达「享受用餐」的信号，做菜的人也开心。

scenes.title: 结账
scenes.content: Check, please.或Can I have the bill, please?都是餐厅最后必备句。
scenes.highlight:
Check, please.
Can I have the bill?

scenes.title: Thank you!
scenes.content: Thank you for the meal.「我开动了/谢谢款待」的英语版。说出来餐桌就温暖。

scenes.speech: 小测验加鲁！「请给我水」用英语怎么说？
scenes.quizQuestion: 礼貌地要水，最自然的句子是？
quizChoices: Can I have some water, please?
scenes.quizExplanation: Can I have some water, please?最礼貌自然。重点是加please。

scenes.speech: 这下世界各地餐厅都不怕加鲁🌟
scenes.title: 课程完成！
